```python
# Signed: Assistant + gpt-4o, 2024-04-26
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: This file contains a utility function to convert strings into URL-safe slugs, commonly used in web development for generating clean URLs from titles or labels.
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - The function is simple, well-defined, and relies on standard string and regex operations with no ambiguous edge cases.
# Open: None

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
